response.justification: Aisha demonstrates extensive full-stack experience (13+ years) with deep involvement in scalable systems, microservices, and AI-agent infrastructure, closely matching the role's requirements. Her work spans TypeScript/Node.js, React, cloud platforms, and databases, with measurable impact in high-throughput environments. However, her background includes less common stacks (Dlang) and limited direct experience with Nest.js, which could pose minor adaptation challenges.
strengths: 13+ years of full-stack experience with strong TypeScript/Node.js and React expertise
Direct experience scaling systems (millions of requests/sec, Direct Mail automation) and contributing to AI-agent infrastructure
Proven ownership of end-to-end features, architecture decisions, and process improvements
concerns: Limited direct experience with Nest.js, a primary stack requirement
Mixed background includes non-core technologies (Dlang) which may dilute focus on required stacks
No explicit mention of Vitest testing framework experience, though Jest/Playwright are referenced
